name: Granitecreek
notes: Granite Creek Capital Partners — private investment firm at 222 W. Adams Street Suite 3125, Chicago, IL 60606.

name: Ubs
notes: UBS Group AG is a Swiss multinational investment bank and financial services company headquartered in Zurich and Basel, Switzerland.

name: Bbr Partners
notes: BBR Partners is a privately held multi-family office serving ultra-high net worth clients, headquartered in New York City.

name: Andersen
notes: Andersen (andersen.com) is a global tax, valuation, financial advisory and consulting firm — founding member of Andersen Global. HQ at 100 First Street, San Francisco, CA 94105.

name: Transposeplatform
notes: Transpose Platform Management — global formation-stage VC fund founded by Alex Bangash and Trang T. Nguyen. Primary HQ listed as San Francisco, CA; one source lists a Houston, TX office address (800 Town and Country, Suite 500).

name: Carbonarrow
notes: Carbon Arrow — provides operations and capital solutions for technology and services businesses. HQ in Austin, Texas. Founded 2015.

name: Daytonfamily
notes: daytonfamily.com did not resolve. Most likely connected to the Dayton family (founders of Target/Dayton's) whose family office Okabena is based in Minneapolis, MN. Could not directly confirm daytonfamily.com identity or location.

name: Transmarket Group
notes: TransMarket Group (TMG) is a privately held quantitative proprietary trading firm founded in 1980, headquartered in Chicago, IL. Additional offices in Puerto Rico and Switzerland.

name: 13fi
notes: 13th Floor Investments — boutique real estate investment and development firm focused on value-add transactions in Florida and the Southeast US. HQ at 848 Brickell Ave Ph 1, Miami, FL 33131.

name: M13
notes: M13 is an early-stage venture capital firm headquartered at 1920 Olympic Blvd, Santa Monica, CA 90404. Also has a NYC office.

name: Pfm Llc
notes: pfmllc.co returned no content. Could not identify the specific entity behind this domain — multiple unrelated PFM LLC entities exist (Public Financial Management in Philadelphia, Perkins Fund Marketing in Jupiter FL, PFM I LLC in Danbury CT). Cannot confidently match without more context.

name: BCS
notes: BCS Private Wealth Management — fee-based investment advisory firm at 47 West River Road, Rumson, NJ. ~$340M AUM, founded 2015.
